card.name: Flea Caravan
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature entered this turn, create a 1/1 white Insect creature token. {2}, {T}: Creature tokens you control gain flying until end of turn.

card.name: Silken Cradle
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this artifact leaves the battlefield. As long as you control three or more Silk tokens, this artifact has indestructible. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Choir Clapper
card.text: Vigilance When Choir Clapper enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn. {1}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a tapped Silk token. Activate only as a sorcery. (It's an artifact with {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.)

card.name: Choir Elder // Raise Us Higher
card.text:
When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Insect creature token.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying until end of turn if its mana value is 2 or less.

card.name: Choir Hornhead // Ringing Halls
card.text:
Vigilance
---
(Sing only one Song per turn) Exile another target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Choir Procession // Citadel Strong
card.text:
This creature gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Create a 1/1 white Insect creature token and a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

prop.type: Creature — Insect Soldier Bard // Sorcery — Song

card.name: Clawmaiden
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, gain control of another target ability from an artifact source. You may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Cogwork Crawler
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, if you control another artifact, it gets +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Dreg Husk
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Exile target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.

card.name: Grand Reed
card.text: Vigilance {1}, Tap two untapped artifacts you control: This creature gains flying until end of turn. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Huge Flea
card.text: Flash Flying Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Citadel Judge
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies or is put into exile, create a tapped token that's a copy of this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Bellhart Greeter
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast a Song spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Pharlid
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Pilgrim Preacher
card.text: Pilgrimage — {3}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Then if you control six or more lands, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Silk Wraith
card.text: Flying, vigilance At the beginning of your upkeep, if this card is in your graveyard, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.

card.name: Ancient Heart
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) Create two 1/1 green Insect Plant creature tokens. Each creature you control explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.) Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): Nyleth, Seed of Shellwood

card.name: Nyleth, Seed of Shellwood
card.text: Lifelink Other Plants you control have lifelink. Whenever a land or another Plant enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. --- (Front): Ancient Heart

card.name: Pilby's Funeral
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, create a tapped Silk token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") Pilgrimage — {1}{W}: Create two 1/1 white Insect creature tokens. Activate only if you control six or more lands, and only once.

card.name: Running in Circles
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. {6}: Exile enchanted creature, then return it to the battlefield under your control. It's a Silk artifact and loses all other card types. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Sermon in the Vaults
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 1/1 white Insect creature token.

card.name: Crushing Defeat
card.text: Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 5 or greater.

card.name: Parry and Riposte
card.text: Kicker—{2}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature. (You may pay an additional {2} and sacrifice an artifact or creature as you cast this spell.) Target creature you control gets +2/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Save the Threadspun Town
card.text: Choose one — • Save the Threadspun Town deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target creature. • Destroy target artifact with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Thread Storm
card.text: Thread Storm deals 6 damage divided among any number of target attacking or blocking creatures.

card.name: Tragedy of Widow
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It loses all abilities, becomes a white Spider Avatar, and loses all other colors and creature types.

card.name: Valorous Defense
card.text: Creatures you control with mana value 2 or less gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of them.

card.name: Caretaker of Songclave
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Target creature gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. Pilgrimage — As long as you control six or more lands, once during each of your turns, you may cast a permanent spell with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard.

card.name: Flick, the Fixer
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another creature or artifact you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Garmond and Zaza
card.text: Vigilance When Garmond and Zaza enters or blocks, you may put a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. It enters with an extra +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Grand Mother Silk
card.text: Indestructible Grand Mother Silk isn't a creature unless you control three or more Silk tokens. Whenever a creature attacks you, create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.) Sacrifice two other Silk: When target creature you control dies this turn, return it to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Lace, Daughter of Silk
card.text: First strike, vigilance Whenever Lace deals combat damage, put your choice of a +1/+1 counter or charge counter on her. {1}, {T}, Remove X charge counters from Lace and sacrifice her: Draw X cards. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.

card.name: Pinmaster Plinney
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two other target creatures you control. {T}: Another target modified creature you control gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Widow, Threading the Needle
card.text: As Widow enters, choose a card type. Spells of the chosen type cost {1} more to cast. Whenever an opponent casts a spell of the chosen type, you create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Ecstasy of the End
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Create three 1/1 white Insect creature tokens. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Flashback—Each opponent creates two 1/1 white Insect creature tokens. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Spun Deep
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Insect artifact creature tokens. Then if you control five or more creatures, create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Architects' Puzzle
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 1, then draw a card. {2}{U}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 2, then draw two cards.

card.name: Memory Crystal
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature gets +0/+2 and has vigilance. {1}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Create a token that's a copy of equipped creature, except it's 1/1. Activate only as a sorcery. Equip {2}

card.name: Multibinder
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional tapped Silk token are created instead. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") {T}, Tap an untapped artifact you control: Surveil 2.

card.name: School of Kai
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 2/1 blue Fish creature token. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you may tap an untapped creature you control. If you do, return this artifact to its owner's hand. {U}{U}, Discard this card: Counter target activated or triggered ability.

card.name: Silk Cocoon
card.text: Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, put a charge counter on this artifact. {T}, Remove X charge counters from this artifact: Create X Silk tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Choir Minister
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card.

card.name: Cogwork Clapper
card.text: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever this creature deals combat damage, you may remove a counter from it and discard a card. If you do, create two Silk tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Cogwork Cleanser
card.text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever another nontoken artifact you control enters, surveil 1.

card.name: Cogwork Spine
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, surveil 1.

card.name: Karak Gor
card.text: Vigilance When this creature attacks or blocks, put two +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it's not a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Construct artifact creature.

card.name: Fay Mnemonid
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, if it had no counters on it, return it to the battlefield tapped with two stun counters on it. {2}{U}, Discard this card: Tap target creature and put two stun counters on it.

card.name: Fay Mnemonord
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each tapped creature your opponents control. Flying When this creature enters, return up to one target tapped creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Servitor Boran
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw two cards, then discard a card. {4}{U}: Put a stun counter on target tapped creature.

card.name: Servitor Ignim
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Draw a card. • Tap up to one target nonland permanent and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Silk Snipper
card.text: Tap three untapped artifacts you control: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Squatcraw
card.text: Flying When this creature attacks, you may tap an untapped artifact you control. If you do, surveil 2.

card.name: Thread Raker
card.text: Flash This creature enters tapped if it's not your turn. When this creature enters, tap up to two target creatures and put a stun counter on each of them. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Vault Lampbearer // Holy Secrets
card.text:
Flying
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Put a stun counter on target tapped creature. Surveil 1.

card.name: Vault Scrollreader // Sacred Whispers
card.text:
Whenever you surveil, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Surveil 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Hardened Legacy
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) Flash I — Gain control of target noncreature spell. You may choose new targets for it. II — Up to one target creature becomes an artifact and loses all other card types. III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): Crust King Khann

card.name: Crust King Khann
card.text: Whenever an artifact creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. At the beginning of combat on your turn, put two +1/+1 counters on each of up to two target artifacts you control. If they aren't creatures, they become 0/0 Construct creatures in addition to their other types and gain haste until end of turn. --- (Front): Hardened Legacy

card.name: Out in the Cold
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature and put three stun counters on it. When enchanted creature becomes untapped, destroy it.

card.name: Cross Stitch
card.text: Counter target spell. Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Frigid Attunement
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. Remove all stun counters from it and untap it.

card.name: Difficult Delivery
card.text: Choose three. You may choose the same more more than once. • Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. • Draw a card.

card.name: Lost to History
card.text: The owner of target creature, artifact, or nonbasic land puts it into their library second from the top or on the bottom. You create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Refute Heresy
card.text: Counter target spell. Its controller creates a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Tracked and Taken
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If it was attacking, create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Cogwork Dancers
card.text: When Cogwork Dancers enters, if you cast it, create a token that's a copy of it, except the token isn't legendary. At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on each artifact creature you control.

card.name: Fayforn, Oracle of the Mount
card.text: Flash Flying When Fayforn enters, tap up to two target creatures and distribute two stun counters as you choose among them. Whenever one or more counters are removed from a permanent, if it has no other counters of the same type on it, you may draw a card.

card.name: The Last Pinstress
card.text: When The Last Pinstress enters, you may pay {1} up to 3 times. When you do, choose up to that many — • Put a flying counter on Pinstress. • Create a Pin token. (It's an Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and Equip {1}.) • Draw a card. Put a stun counter on up to one target tapped creature.

card.name: Pious Isamor
card.text: Defender Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may tap another untapped creature you control. If you do, surveil 1 and create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Relic Seeker Scrounge
card.text: Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") As long as you control four or more artifacts, Scrounge has ward {2}. As long as you control eight or more artifacts, creatures you control can't be blocked.

card.name: Vaultkeeper Cardinius
card.text: Whenever you cast a sorcery spell, note its name. Whenever a nontoken artifact you control enters, you may create a copy of a spell with a name noted by Cardinius. You may cast the copy by paying {2} instead of its mana cost. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Zylotol, Plasmium Alchemist
card.text: When Zylotol dies, return him to the battlefield with two +1/+1 counters. He loses all abilities. {T}, Sacrifice an artifact or land: Draw two cards, then discard a card. Put a +1/+1 counter on Zylotol.

card.name: Architects' Melody
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. If this card was cast from a graveyard, put it into your hand instead. Flashback—Tap four untapped artifacts you control. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Song's Authority
card.text: Target player draws two cards. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Roach Guts
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, up to one target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Silk Siphon
card.text: Whenever a creature or artifact you control dies, put a charge counter on this artifact. {2}, {T}, Remove X charge counters from this artifact: Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life.

card.name: Bloatroach
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay life equal to the number of creatures you control. When this creature dies, create two 1/1 green Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Slab Broodmother // Brood's Cycle
card.text:
Flying Whenever a permanent card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, target opponent loses 1 life. (Sing only one Song per turn.)
---
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or artifact. Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Drapelord
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you don't, you lose 3 life.

card.name: Gargant Gloom
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 black Insect Horror creature token with flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it." Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Burrowing Grom
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another artifact or creature. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: Muckroach
card.text: Deathtouch {B}{B}, Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Old Penitent
card.text: When this creature enters the battlefield, target opponent gains 2 life. At the beginning of your end step, if you committed a crime this turn, return target creature or artifact card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)

card.name: Penitent Prisoner
card.text: Whenever you commit a crime, you may pay {2} and 1 life. If you do, draw a card. Do this only once each turn. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)

card.name: Overgrown Plasmidas
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to this creature. Whenever a creature or artifact dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Rowdy Roachkeeper
card.text: Menace Ward—Sacrifice a permanent or pay 2 life. Ward abilities you control trigger an additional time.

card.name: Shadow Charger
card.text: Menace {2}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Look at the top four cards of your library, exile any number of them in a face-down pile, and exile the rest into a face-up pile. Target opponent chooses a pile. Put those cards into your hand, and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Slab Guardfly
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 2 life. When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a nonland card from it until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Snitchfly
card.text: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose 1 life. Exile two cards from your graveyard: This creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Spit Squit
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 1 life. If an opponent would lose life during your turn, they lose that much life plus 1 instead.

card.name: Stilkin Hunter
card.text: Flash Ward—Pay 2 life. When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1.

card.name: Undersweep
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, mill two cards. {2}: Exile target card from a graveyard. Surveil 1. You gain 1 life. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Void Mass
card.text: Whenever you lose life, you may pay {B}. If you do, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Slab Wardenfly
card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. Whenever you commit a crime, each opponent loses 1 life. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.) Whenever an opponent commits a crime, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Whiteward Surgeon
card.text: Sacrifice a creature or artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If this isn't the first time this ability has resolved this turn, you lose 1 life.

card.name: First of the First
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) Create a 1/2 white Spider token with reach. Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): First Sinner, Absolution Denied

card.name: First Sinner, Absolution Denied
card.text: As this creature enters, sacrifice another creature. Put a number of +1/+1 counters on this creature equal to the sacrificed creature's power. Menace, indestructible When this creature attacks, each opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a creature or discard a card. --- (Front): First of the First

card.name: Great Taste of Pharloom
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one that hasn't been chosen. Then if all options have been chosen, you lose the game: • Mossberry Stew — Add two mana of any one color. • Vintage Nectar — Create two 2/1 green Insect creature tokens. • Courier's Rasher — Put up to one creature card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield. It gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. • Crustnut — Destroy target creature. • Pickled Muckmaggot — Each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Infestation Operation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Destroy target creature with mana value X or less.

card.name: Overworked
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice an artifact or creature. (You may sacrifice an artifact or creature in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, that creature gets -6/-6 until end of turn.

card.name: Penance By Constriction
card.text: Exile target creature. If an opponent committed a crime this turn, create a Silk token. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime. It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Rune Rage
card.text: Destroy target creature. If you sacrificed a permanent this turn, all creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Sister of the Void
card.text: Surveil 2. Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Threaded Black
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Bell Eater, Bellveins' Blight
card.text: Menace When Bell Eater attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. When you do, target opponent may sacrifice a creature or artifact. If they don't, each player loses 2 life and you draw two cards.

card.name: Crull and Benjin, Retired
card.text: Whenever you attack, you lose 1 life and create a tapped 1/1 black Insect creature token with deathtouch.

card.name: Loam, Cog in the Machine
card.text: {T}, Pay 3 life, Sacrifice this creature: Add {B}{B}{B}.

card.name: Lace, Lost to the Void
card.text: First strike, deathtouch Whenever Lace deals combat damage to a player, you may put a +1/+1 counter on her. If you do, each player discards their hand, then draws that many cards minus one. {1}, {T}: Lace phases out. Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn, and only if Lace has three or more counters on her. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Skynx, Holding Face
card.text: Flash Menace You may have Skynx enter as a copy of any creature card in a graveyard that was put there this turn, except it's a 4/3 black Horror with menace in addition to its other types.

card.name: Dark Descent
card.text: Mill three cards, then put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control for each permanent card milled this way. If this card was cast from a graveyard, put up to one target creature card from among the milled cards into your hand. Flashback {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Elegy of the Deep
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Each player mills three cards, then put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, instead put up to two target creature cards from graveyards onto the battlefield this way. Flashback—Sacrifice three creatures. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Tragedy of Phantom
card.text: Exile one or two target nonland permanent cards from your graveyard. For as long as those cards remain exiled, you may cast them during your turn by paying 3 life and sacrificing a nontoken creature rather than paying their mana costs.

card.name: Barbed Bracelet
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Double all damage equipped creature would deal and be dealt. {2}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this Equipment: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and gains trample until end of turn. Equip—{1}, Pay 3 life.

card.name: Curveclaw
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has first strike. {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Equipped creature deals 1 damage to any target. (Activate only if this Equipment is attached to a creature.) Equip {2}

card.name: Diving Bell
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards. Whenever this Vehicle attacks, return up to one target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's a creature, it enters tapped and attacking. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Crew 2

card.name: Volt Filament
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has menace. {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Until end of turn, if a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead. Equip {1}

card.name: Voltridian
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 2 damage to any target. {2}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards.

card.name: Burning Bugs
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card or sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, choose one — • Draw a card. • Create a tapped Treasure token. • It deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Cogwork Hauler
card.text: Whenever another artifact you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent. When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Covetous Pilgrim
card.text: Reach, haste When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. Whenever an artifact enters under your control, this creature deals 2 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Crustcrag
card.text: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Modified creatures you control have menace. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Deep Diver
card.text: Reach, haste When this creature enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact, instant, or sorcery card from among them and exile it. You may cast the exiled card until the end of your next turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your libary in a random order.

card.name: Flintbeetle
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature with mana value 2 or less enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to target player.

card.name: Smokerock Sifter
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature blocks a creature with flying, it gets +3/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Lavalarga
card.text: Reach At the beginning of your first main phase, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Then if it has two or more counters on it, remove all counters from it and it deals that much damage to each opponent.

card.name: Mottled Skarr
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks alone, if it's modified, it gets +2/+2 and gains first strike until end of turn. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Skarrgard
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to up to one target creature. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Skarr Scout
card.text: As long as you control a creature with power 5 or greater, this creature has menace and haste. {T}: Add {R}. Use this mana only to cast an Equipment spell or activate an equip ability.

card.name: Skull Brute
card.text: Menace Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. • This creature deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Smelt Shoveller
card.text: Haste {2}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature or a charge counter on target artifact. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Red Memory
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) I — You get an emblem with "Artifacts you control have ‘{2}, {T}: This artifact deals 1 damage to any target.'" II — Search your library and/or graveyard for an artifact card with mana value 4 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): Hornet, Daughter of Hallownest

card.name: Hornet, Daughter of Hallownest
card.text: First strike, menace, haste When Hornet enters, create three Silk tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") When Hornet deals combat damage to a player, untap all artifacts you control. --- (Front): Red Memory

card.name: Order of Karak
card.text: Warriors and Soldiers you control get +1/+0. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 white Insect Soldier creature token. It gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Explosive Retribution
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to each other creature and each player."

card.name: Fiery Annihilation
card.text: Fiery Annihilation deals 5 damage to target creature. Exile up to one target Equipment attached to that creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Flintflame Explosion
card.text: Choose one — • Flintflame Explosion deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Target Practice
card.text: Choose two — • You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. • Destroy up to one target artifact. • Change the target of another target spell or ability with a single target.

card.name: Workshop Hazard
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice an artifact or creature. (You may sacrifice an artifact or creature in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Workshop Hazard deals 6 damage to target creature. If this spell was kicked, it deals 8 damage to that creature instead.

card.name: Forebrothers Signis and Gron
card.text: Equipment you control have "Equip—Sacrifice a creature." Whenever one or more other creature cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere, Signis and Gron deal 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Forge Daughter
card.text: Other artifact creatures you control get +1/+0. {1}, {T}: Put a charge counter on target artifact.

card.name: Hornet, Red Maiden
card.text: First strike Tools you control enter with an additional charge counter on them. At the beginning of combat on your turn, attach up to one target Equipment you control to Hornet.

card.name: Loddie the Ladybug
card.text: Flying {T}: Loddie deals 1 damage to any target. Put a charge counter on target artifact you control. Remove three counters from among artifacts you control: Create a Treasure token.

card.name: The First Seamstress
card.text: When The First Seamstress enters, you may pay {1} up to three times. When you do, choose up to that many — • Destroy target artifact. • Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one other target creature. • You may discard an artifact card or sacrifice an artifact. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Trobbio, Dazzling Dancer // See My Flair
card.text:
Double strike Whenever another creature or artifact dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Trobbio.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) See My Flair deals 3 damage to target creature unless that creature's controller has See My Flair deal 3 damage to them.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Performer // Instant — Song

card.name: Voltvyrm, Charged Coil
card.text: When Voltvyrm enters, each creature you control deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Beastling Call
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Then if this card was cast from your graveyard, it deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to any target. Flashback—Sacrifice two lands. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Skarr Ambush
card.text: Choose one — • Skarr Ambush deals 5 damage to each creature. • Destroy all artifacts you don't control. • Create a 5/3 red Insect creature token with menace. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Tool Barrage
card.text: Kicker—{1}{R}. (You may pay an additional {1}{R} as you cast this spell.) Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Work Orders
card.text: Discard your hand, then draw cards equal to the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Warding Bell
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. It gains indestructible until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +3/+0. Equip {4}

card.name: Barnak
card.text: Defender, reach, deathtouch Ward—Sacrifice a creature with flying or pay {2}.

card.name: Bone Bottom Merchant
card.text: Pilgrimage — {1}, {T}: Reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, put it into your hand and create a Treasure token. Activate only if you control six or mroe lands.

card.name: Cloverstag // Verdant Chirp
card.text:
Defender Pilgrimage — As long as you control six or more lands, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Up to X target permanents each become the color of your choice until end of turn.

card.name: Craggler
card.text: Reach, ward {2} Verdant — This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control.

card.name: Ductsucker
card.text: Reach, trample Ward—Discard a land card or pay {2}. When this creature attacks, mill two cards.

card.name: Harbone Elder
card.text: Reach Whenever a creature or artifact is put into your graveyard from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Horned Pilgrim // Our Last Rest
card.text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Pilgrimage — You gain 2 life. If you control six or more lands, you gain 5 life instead.

card.name: Last Claw
card.text: Vigilance As long as you control a creature with power 5 or greater, you may cast this card from your graveyard.

card.name: Thrashing Marrowmaw
card.text: Trample Verdant — When this creature enters, destroy up to X target artifacts and/or enchantments, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control.

card.name: Massive Mossgrub
card.text: Trample This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Moss Druid
card.text: Landfall —Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life and surveil 1. Pilgrimage — As long as you control six or more lands, creatures you control have "Whenever this creature is dealt damage, create a Silk token." (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Moss Mother
card.text: Pilgrimage — This creature has flying as long as you control six or more lands. When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Overgrown Pilgrim // Damp and Dim
card.text:
Vigilance
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Surveil 1.

card.name: Rhinogrund
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Skarr Stalker
card.text: Trample Modified creatures you control have trample. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Splinter
card.text: {3}{G}: This creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Weary Pilgrim
card.text: Pilgrimage — When this creature enters, mill four cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand. If you control six or more lands, you may put a permanent card from among them into your hand instead.

card.name: Fading Voice
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) I — You gain an emblem with "Creatures you control get +1/+1." II — Target creature you control deals damage equal to twice its power to target creature you don't control. III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): Skarrsinger Karmelita

card.name: Skarrsinger Karmelita
card.text: Vigilance, trample, ward {3}. Other creatures you control have ward {1}. At the beginning of combat on your turn, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it onto the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. --- (Front): Fading Voice

card.name: Survive My Gauntlet
card.text: When this enchantment enters, mill three cards. {2}{G}{G}: Exile two target creature cards from your graveyard. Create an X/X black and green Insect creature token with ward {1}, where X is the total power of cards exiled this way.

card.name: Lost Couriers
card.text: Return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand, then discard a card.

card.name: Pale Hunt
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. When you search your library this way, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Putrid Rot
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.

card.name: Revolt of the Stilkin
card.text: Destroy all artifacts and enchantments. For each permanent destroyed this way, its controller creates a 3/3 green Insect creature token.

card.name: Vengeful Soul
card.text: Mill X cards, then put a number of +1/+1 counter on target creature equal to twice the number of permanent cards milled this way.

card.name: Clover Dancers
card.text: Vigilance Verdant — When this creature enters, create X 3/2 green Insect Warrior creature tokens with vigilance, where X is twice the number of colors among permanents you control.

card.name: Gilly, Perfectly Disguised
card.text: {2}, {T}: Choose up to two colors. Gilly becomes a land in addition to her other types that's the chosen colors and gains "{T}: Add one mana of either of the chosen colors." Activate this ability only once.

card.name: Reed, the Last Pondcatcher
card.text: Reed gets +1/+1 for each card type among cards in your graveyard. Pilgrimage — When Reed enters, if you control six or more lands, he deals damage equal to his power to up to one target creature.

card.name: Shakra, Defender of Bellhart
card.text: Vigilance, trample, ward {2} Shakra enters with X +1/+1 counters on her. If X is 3 or more, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If X is 6 or more, she deals damage equal to her power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Sister Splinter
card.text: Whenever Sister Splinter attacks, creatures you control get +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is half the number of lands you control, rounded down. If X is 4 or more, they also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Vog, Hunter Flea // Caravan's Ritual
card.text:
Vigilance Whenever another creature enters under your control, add one mana of any color.
---
(Sing only one song per turn.) Caravan's Ritual deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target creature.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Warrior // Sorcery — Song

card.name: Heretical Behavior
card.text: Pilgrimage — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control six or more lands. Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Draw a card.

card.name: Seek the Old Hearts
card.text: Return all lands cards from your graveyard to the battlefield, then return all permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Exile Seek the Old Hearts.

card.name: Trail's End
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Draw cards equal to the greatest power among creatures you control. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, exile target artifact or enchantment. Flashback—Tap any number of untapped creatures you control with total power 15 or greater. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Cogwork Heart
card.text: {1}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. You may reveal an artifact card from your hand. If you do, put a charge counter on this artifact. {2}, {T}: Remove three charge counters from this artifact and sacrifice it: Create Second Sentinel, a legendary 5/5 white and blue Construct artifact creature token with first strike. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Synchronized Flight
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create two 2/3 red Insect Beast creature tokens with flying. Creatures you control have menace and haste.

card.name: Fallen into Muckmaggots
card.text: Mill five cards. You may put a permanent card from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard. Up to one target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Ballador, Last Conductor // Conductor's Melody
card.text:
Defender Song spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each artifact you control. (Sing only one Song per turn.)
---
You gain half X life and create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Performer // Sorcery — Song

card.name: Crawfather, Lord and Justice
card.text: Flying, menace Whenever another creature you control with flying dies, destroy up to one target creature without flying an opponent controls. Its controller loses 2 life. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Father of the Flame
card.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {T}, Remove X counters from Father and sacrifice it: It deals X damage to target opponent. Search your library for an Equipment card with mana value X or less, reveal it, put it onto the battlefield attached to target creature you control, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fourth Chorus
card.text: Whenever Fourth Chorus attacks, create a Silk token. Then, Fourth Chorus deals X damage divided among any number of targets, where X is the number of other artifacts you control. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Green Prince of Verdania
card.text: Verdant — When Green Prince enters, you draw X cards, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control. When Green Prince dies, return him from your graveyard to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Lost Verdania

card.name: Lost Verdania
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) {X}{G}{U}, {T}: Create an X/X green Insect Spirit creature token. --- (Front): Green Prince of Verdania

card.name: Groal the Great
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. Groal gets +X/+0, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard. If X is 5 or more, Groal has flying. Groal has all ward abilities among other creatures you control.

card.name: Gurr the Outcast
card.text: Trample, ward {2} Whenever Gurr attacks alone, it gets +2/+1 until end of turn for each Equipment attached to it.

card.name: Hornet, Pale Hunter
card.text: First strike Whenever an artifact you control enters, choose one that hasn't been chosen this turn — • Untap Hornet. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. • Put a +1/+1 counter on Hornet, then she deals damage equal to her power to each opponent. • Surveil 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Last Judge
card.text: Vigilance When this creature attacks or dies, it deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to any target.

card.name: The Moorwing, Mite-Beast
card.text: Flying, menace At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, you lose 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Phantom, Stretched Thin
card.text: First strike When Phantom attacks, exile up to one target nonland card from a graveyard. Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is that card's mana value. {1}, Pay 2 life, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.

card.name: Shakra, Wielding Rings // Tribal Melody
card.text:
Vigilance Remove a +1/+1 counter from Shakra: Tap target creature.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Warrior // Sorcery — Song

card.name: Sherma, Peppy Pilgrim // Cheery Chime
card.text:
Whenever you cast a Song spell, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Pilgrimage — Target creature you control gains vigilance until end of turn. If you control six or more lands, it also gains double strike until end of turn.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Peasant // Sorcery — Song

card.name: The Unravelled
card.text: {2}{WB}{WB}: Return The Unravelled from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice The Unravelled: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.

card.name: Tormented Trobbio // Woe Are We
card.text:
Whenever a player sacrifices a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Trobbio and he deals 1 damage to any target.
---
(Sing only one Song per turn.) Target opponent sacrifice a creature or artifact unless they discard a card.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Insect Performer // Sorcery Song — Song

card.name: Twelfth Architect
card.text: Whenever another artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one other target creature you control. {4}: Create a tapped Silk token. Activate only as a sorcery. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Mossberry Hunt
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control five or more lands, repeat this process once.

card.name: Skull Tyrant's Rampage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or discard a card. Choose one — • Draw two cards. • Skull Tyrant's Rampage deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Cogfly
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature has "Whenever this creature attacks, artifact creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn." {2}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Create a 1/1 Insect Construct artifact creature token with flying. Equip {1}

card.name: Craw Memento
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player puts it into their library second from the top or on the bottom. {1}{UB}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fractured Mask
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Whenever equipped creature attacks, it gains indestructible until end of turn if you control a creature with power 5 or creater. {1}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Equip {3}

card.name: Cogwork Defender
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and surveil 1. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Coral Furm
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it, When this creature dies, put its counters on another target creature or artifact you control. If it's not a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Construct artifact creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Dregwheel
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Escalion
card.text: Flash Vigilance Verdant — When this creature enters, surveil X, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control, then draw a card.

card.name: Gahlia
card.text: Pilgrimage — When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature. Surveil 1. If you control six or more lands, repeat this process once.

card.name: Karaka Guards
card.text: {4}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value 2 or less or an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Choir Maestro
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, create three 1/1 Insect Construct artifact creature tokens with flying that are tapped and attacking. Sacrifice those tokens at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Plasmid
card.text: Menace {3}, Sacrifice a creature or artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Savage Beastfly
card.text: Flying Ward—Have this creature fight the creature you control with the lowest toughness. Other Insects you control get +2/+0. Other Beasts you control get +0/+2. {3}{RG}: Create a 1/1 green Insect creature token for each Beast you control.

card.name: Skull Tyrant
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of artifacts and/or creatures. This spell costs {2} less for each permanent sacrificed this way. Menace, trample When Skull Tyrant enters, it deals 3 damage to up to one target creature.

card.name: Stilkin Trappers
card.text: Deathtouch Ward—Sacrifice an artifact or pay 3 life. Whenever this creature attacks, mill two cards.

card.name: Tallcraw Juror
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards unless you discard a creature card with flying.

card.name: Verdanirs
card.text: When this creature enters, if you cast it, create a token that's a copy of it. Verdant — This creature's power is equal to the number of colors among permanents you control.

card.name: Whiteward Mortician
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another non-Silk artifact or creature: You gain 1 life and create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Roach Tenders' Rounds
card.text: When this enchantment enters, surveil 3. Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you lose 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, return a creature card at random from your graveyard to your hand. You gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Graceful Skirmish
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Bell Beast, Trusty Transport
card.text: When Bell Beast attacks while saddles, search your library for a creature card with mana value 2 or less, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Saddle 2 (Tap any number of other creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Mount becomes saddled until end of turn. Saddle only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Lugoli, Disgraced Chef
card.text: Deathtouch Ward—Create a Food token. When Lugoli enters, surveil 2.

card.name: Nuu, Creature Collector
card.text: When Nuu enters and at the beginning of your first main phase, look at the top card of your library. If it's a creature card, you may reveal it and put it into your hand. Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Shrine Guardian Seth
card.text: Vigilance Seth enters with a shield counter on him. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever a creature you control dies, proliferate. This ability triggers only once each turn. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Plasmified Zango
card.text: Zango's power is equal to the number of card types among cards in all graveyards, and its toughness is equal to that number plus 1. Whenever Zango is dealt damage, you may sacrifice another creature or artifact. If you do, it deals that much damage to any target.

card.name: Pilgrimage's End
card.text: Create a 1/1 green Insect creature token for each land you control.

card.name: The Chorus Project
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile X creature and/or artifact cards you control or creature and/or artifact cards in your graveyard. Create X 0/0 Construct artifact creature tokens, then put X +1/+1 counters on each artifact creature you control.

card.name: Twisted End
card.text: Up to one target creature you control becomes a Plant in addition to its other types and has base power and toughness 1/1. It gains indestructible until end of turn. Then, destroy all creatures.

card.name: The Threefold Statues
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1. You may cast Song spells as though they had flash. Once during each of your turns, you may cast a Song spell without paying its mana cost. When you do, draw a card.

card.name: Craftmetal
card.text: {1}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only once each turn. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Drifter's Cloak
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Whenever equipped creature attacks, draw a card. Equip {2}

card.name: Fine Pin
Injector Band
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each creature and artifact card in your graveyard. {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact and sacrifice another nonland permanent: Draw a card. Equip {3}

card.name: Needolin
Pollip Pouch
card.text: Equipped creatures you control have toxic 2. (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get two poison counters.)

card.name: Rosary Cannon
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Whenever equipped creature attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, it gets +3/+3 until end of turn. {1}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this Equipment: Create a Treasure token. Equip—Sacrifice an artifact or pay {2}.

card.name: Sands of Karak Bench
card.text: {4}, {T}: Create a 2/2 white Insect Soldier creature token. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

card.name: Shakra's Compass
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has vigilance as long as you control six or more lands. {2}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Activate only if this Equipment is attached to a creature. Equip {1}

card.name: Watcher at the Edge
card.text: Vigilance {T}, Mill a card: Add one mana of any color. {X}: Put X +1/+1 counters on this artifact. If it's not a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Insect Soldier in addition to its other types. Activate only if there are three or more creature cards in your graveyard, and only once.

card.name: Weavelight
card.text: (Tools enter with three charge counters on them.) At the beginning of your first main phase, if you have four or more cards in hand, put a +1/+1 counter on equipped creature. {2}, {T}, Remove a charge counter from this Equipment: Draw a card. Equip {1}

card.name: Cogworkers
card.text: Flying {6}, {T}: Create 1/1 Insect Construct artifact creature token. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each counter on this creature.

card.name: Shardillard
card.text: Flying {T}: Put your choice of a +1/+1 counter or charge counter on another target artifact.

card.name: Winged Furm
card.text: Flying As this creature enters, choose a color. This creature is the chosen color. {3}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library. If the card shares a color with this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Greyroot, Servant of the Rite
card.text: When Greyroot enters, target permanent becomes a 1/1 Plant creature and loses all other card types and abilities. It gains "When this creature dies, its controller loses 4 life."

card.name: Blasted Steps
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Bone Bottom
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Choral Chambers
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Deep Docks
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Far Fields
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Greymoor
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Moss Grotto
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Putrified Ducts
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Underworks
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Weavenest Atla
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {4}, {T}: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Wormways
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Citadel of Song
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}. Craft with artifact {5}{B}{B} ({5}{B}{B}, Exile this artifact, Exile another artifact you control or an artifact card from your graveyard: Return this card transformed under its owner's control. Craft only as a sorcery.) --- (Back): Void-Snared Citadel

card.name: Void-Snared Citadel
card.text: As this artifact enters and at the beginning of your end step, you lose 1 life and create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") Sacrifice two creatures and/or artifacts: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Target opponent loses 2 life. --- (Front): Citadel of Song

card.name: Bilewater
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Cogwork Core
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Craw Lake
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: High Halls
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W} or {U}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Hunter's March
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Pilgrim's Rest
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Sands of Karak
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: The Marrow
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Verdanian Temple
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Whiteward
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. Activate only if you control three or more other lands or if a creature you control entered this turn.

card.name: Sherma, Devout Caretaker
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Corrcrust Karaka
card.text: When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on target artifact you control. If it's not a creature, it becomes a 0/0 Construct artifact creature.

card.name: Yumama
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a 2/1 blue Fish creature token. If a permanent entering the battlefield causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Choral Barracks
card.text: Whenever an Equipment you control enters, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 2/2 white Insect Soldier creature token, then you may attach that Equipment to it. {3}, {T}: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an Equipment card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Grand Confrontation
card.text: Exile target creature or artifact. Its controller creates a tapped Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.")

card.name: Vaultkeeper's Melody
card.text: (Sing only one Song per turn.) Surveil 1, then draw a card. Flashback—{UB}, Pay 3 life. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Eva, Discarded Weaverspawn
card.text: Defender At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control. It gains your choice of flying, vigilance, or hexproof until your next turn. When Eva dies or is put into exile from the battlefield, return it to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Sylphsong

card.name: Sylphsong
card.text: When Sylphsong enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a Silk token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. Activate only if a creature entered this turn.") If Sylphsong would leave the battlefield, exile it instead. --- (Front): Eva, Discarded Weaverspawn
